title: An Unusual Suspect
overview: Fresh out of law school and looking to make waves at her new firm, young lawyer VIOLA JANUARY works nights to a pro bone case to free a man she believes was wrongly accused of kidnapping a young woman. But after a victory in court, Viola discovers that the truth is more complicated than she initially thought when she becomes the next target of the real killer.
